mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vendor ( vendor_id, vendor_name, vendor_type, vendor_tel, vendor_email, vendor_zipcode, vendor_addr, vendor_addr_detail, vendor_usage ) VALUES ( 'VD' || VENDOR_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{vendorName}, #{vendorType}, #{vendorTel}, #{vendorEmail}, #{vendorZipcode}, #{vendorAddr}, #{vendorAddrDetail}, 'Y' )
mapper.select: SELECT vendor_id AS vendorId, vendor_name AS vendorName, vendor_type AS vendorType, vendor_tel AS vendorTel, vendor_email AS vendorEmail, vendor_zipcode AS vendorZipcode, vendor_addr AS vendorAddr, vendor_addr_detail AS vendorAddrDetail, vendor_usage AS vendorUsage FROM vendor WHERE vendor_id = #{vendorId} AND vendor_usage = 'Y'
mapper.update: UPDATE vendor SET vendor_name = #{vendorName}, vendor_type = #{vendorType}, vendor_tel = #{vendorTel}, vendor_email = #{vendorEmail}, vendor_zipcode = #{vendorZipcode}, vendor_addr = #{vendorAddr}, vendor_addr_detail = #{vendorAddrDetail} WHERE vendor_id = #{vendorId}
